Game.Name: BreakThru! (USA)
Game.plot: In the award-winning tradition of Tetris, comes BreakThru! This time, your goal is to make as many bricks disappear as you can before time runs out. Click on a group of same-colored bricks to remove bricks and make the wall come tumbling down.
Game.Notes: BreakThru is a frenetic-paced puzzle that forces you to think fast. The fun starts with a clock and a solid wall of colored bricks. Eliminate the bricks by clicking on two or more neighboring bricks of the same color. Tear down wall after wall through six cities as you race the clock to raise your score. Watch out! Pesky spiders, annoying soda cans and obnoxious boulders are out to make life rough. Knock them out of action with rockets and dynamite before time runs out, so you can break throw h to the next wall.
